pageSubtitle: A leading global forex and CFD broker, providing traders worldwide with access to 200+ financial instruments, tight spreads, and institutional-grade execution.
missionText: Our mission is to empower traders worldwide with the tools, technology, and support they need to succeed in the global financial markets.
missionDescription: Founded in 2018, Dolphin Markets has grown to become one of the most trusted names in online trading. We are committed to providing our clients with the best possible trading experience through innovative technology, competitive pricing, and exceptional customer service.
fscRegulatedDesc: Licensed and regulated by the Financial Services Commission of Mauritius
segregatedFundsFeatureDesc: Client funds held in segregated accounts for maximum protection
fastExecutionDesc: Sub-millisecond execution speeds with no requotes
lowSpreadsDesc: Interbank pricing with spreads from 0.0 pips
multiPlatformDesc: Trade on MT5 desktop, web, and mobile
ctaDescription: Join over 150,000 traders worldwide and experience the Dolphin Markets difference.
